title: Kenyan Kebabs with Spicy Piquant Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy dish originating from Kenya, featuring marinated kebabs served with a piquant sauce.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Piquant Sauce
ingredients.notes: available at most African grocery stores

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut oil, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add in the chicken breast and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the chicken, onions, and kebabs skewers onto skewers.
Grill for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the kebabs are cooking, mix together Kenyan Piquant Sauce and lime juice in a small bowl.
Serve the kebabs with the piquant sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with crispy onions and additional piquant sauce if desired.
